comment_content: Free kicks don't deserve to be in the top 10 for me. Not even top 100. Unless it's a once in a lifetime type of free kick like the one from Roberto Carlos. Long range shots don't do it for me either. There are the odd ones that stand out there like the Marmoush one but I don't consider them top ten. Lots of luck involved when it comes to power shots from distance. I rate higher finesse shots with accuracy. These ones deserve to be in the top 10 (some aren't). De la Vega, Meerdink, Luis dias. Kvaratshelia (great turn/dribble then shot with what I assume is his weaker foot), orrantia (great skill and shot), deiola (great team goal). Rodriguez volley, montiel (great bicycle from out of the box - he had to generate power)
